formula_complexity: Medium - Weighted scoring algorithms with multi-factor risk matrices. Risk = Probability × Severity × Exposure. Requires climate scenario probability distributions.
input_requirements: Project location (lat/long), building type, service life (years), climate zone, historical hazard data, IPCC AR6 scenario data, local infrastructure vulnerability data
tool_integration: Climate data APIs (NOAA, IPCC), GIS hazard mapping tools (FEMA, USGS), Risk assessment platforms, Historical weather databases
validation: Cross-check with FEMA flood maps, USGS landslide data, NOAA storm databases. Validate risk scoring against industry standard methodologies (ISO 31000).
notes: Calculations involve weighted scoring of multiple hazard types. Automation can handle data aggregation and initial scoring, but expert review needed for adaptive capacity assessment.

formula_complexity: Medium - Statistical analysis of demographic data, weighted scoring for equity indicators, proximity calculations for infrastructure access.
input_requirements: Project address, census tract ID, local zoning data, transit network data, healthcare facility locations, school locations, employment centers
tool_integration: US Census API, EPA EJScreen, HUD housing databases, Local GIS data, Transit authority APIs, Walk Score API
validation: Verify demographic data against Census Bureau releases. Cross-check EJ Screen indices. Validate infrastructure distances with local planning data.
notes: Primarily data aggregation and statistical analysis. Calculations are straightforward but require access to multiple government databases.

formula_complexity: High - Time-series carbon modeling with grid decarbonization curves. Total Carbon = Σ(Annual Energy × Grid Factor) + Embodied Carbon + Refrigerant GWP. Requires NPV-style calculations over 25 years.
input_requirements: Annual energy use by fuel type (from EAp1), material quantities (from MRp2), refrigerant types and charges (from EAp5), grid emission factors (eGRID), grid decarbonization projections
tool_integration: EnergyPlus/OpenStudio outputs, EC3/Tally for embodied carbon, EPA eGRID database, IPCC emission factors, Grid decarbonization models
validation: Validate energy model against ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G. Cross-check embodied carbon with CLF Material Baselines. Verify grid factors against EPA eGRID.
notes: Highly automatable with clear formulas. Main challenge is integrating data from multiple sources (energy model, WBLCA, refrigerant schedules).

formula_complexity: Low - No mathematical calculations. Primarily document organization and template population.
input_requirements: Project specifications, LEED credit strategies, base building documentation, prerequisite requirements
tool_integration: Document generation tools, Template management systems
validation: Review by LEED AP for completeness. Cross-check against LEED prerequisite list.
notes: Minimal calculation work. Primarily documentation and template generation.

formula_complexity: Low - Primarily qualitative process documentation. Limited quantitative metrics for goal tracking.
input_requirements: Project team roster, owner requirements, LEED target level, sustainability goals
tool_integration: Project management platforms, Goal tracking dashboards
validation: Charrette attendance verification. Goal documentation review.
notes: Process-based credit with minimal calculation requirements. Focus on documentation and facilitation.

formula_complexity: Low - Points summation based on included clauses. Binary compliance checking against Green Lease Leaders criteria.
input_requirements: Base building specifications, pursued LEED credits, tenant space requirements, Green Lease Leaders criteria
tool_integration: Green Lease Leaders program database, Lease clause libraries
validation: Green Lease Leaders program verification. Legal review of lease clauses.
notes: Primarily compliance checking and clause inclusion verification. Limited mathematical calculations.

formula_complexity: Low to Medium - Geometric calculations for buffer zones, slope analysis from DEM data, area percentage calculations.
input_requirements: Site boundary coordinates, parcel data, FEMA floodplain maps, NWI wetland data, USGS elevation data (DEM), habitat maps
tool_integration: GIS platforms (ArcGIS, QGIS), FEMA flood map API, NWI wetland database, USGS elevation services
validation: Cross-check floodplain data with FEMA Map Service Center. Verify wetland locations with NWI. Validate slopes with field surveys.
notes: Highly automatable with GIS tools. Buffer calculations and slope analysis are standard GIS operations.

formula_complexity: Low to Medium - Database lookups for brownfield/historic status, percentage calculations for workforce metrics.
input_requirements: Site address, parcel history, local workforce data, construction workforce projections, apprenticeship program details
tool_integration: EPA brownfields database, National Register of Historic Places, Census employment data, Local workforce development databases
validation: EPA brownfield status confirmation. Historic register verification. Workforce data validation with local authorities.
notes: Database integration for site classification. Workforce calculations require local data access.

formula_complexity: Low - Basic arithmetic for density, trip counting within time windows, distance-based proximity analysis.
input_requirements: Site address, surrounding parcel data (assessor), GTFS transit feeds, street network data, amenity locations
tool_integration: Local assessor databases, GTFS transit APIs, Walk Score API, Google Maps/Mapbox for proximity analysis
validation: Verify density with local assessor records. Cross-check transit schedules with agency data. Validate Walk Score with field verification.
notes: Very straightforward calculations. APIs available for most data sources. High automation potential.

formula_complexity: Medium - VMT modeling requires trip generation rates, mode split analysis, distance calculations. Carbon = VMT × Emission Factor.
input_requirements: Project type and size, occupancy, local VMT data, transit accessibility, parking ratios, ITE trip generation rates
tool_integration: ITE Parking Generation Manual data, Regional VMT databases, EPA emission factors, Transit accessibility tools
validation: Validate VMT estimates against regional travel surveys. Cross-check parking ratios with local codes. Verify emission factors with EPA.
notes: VMT calculations can be automated with standard trip generation rates. Regional calibration improves accuracy.

calculation_types: Electrical load calculations for EV charging
formula_complexity: Low - Percentage calculations for EVSE quantities, basic electrical load summation.
input_requirements: Total parking space count, building type, electrical service capacity, accessible parking requirements
tool_integration: Parking calculation tools, Electrical load analysis software, ADA accessible parking calculators
validation: Verify parking counts with site plan. Cross-check electrical load calculations with NEC standards. ADA compliance review.
notes: Simple percentage-based calculations. Very high automation potential.

calculation_types: Erosion control sizing (sediment basins, silt fences)
formula_complexity: Low to Medium - Area calculations, erosion control BMP sizing based on disturbed area.
input_requirements: Site survey, topography, drainage patterns, vegetation inventory, soil types, construction phasing
tool_integration: GIS for vegetation mapping, Erosion control design tools, Soil survey databases (NRCS)
validation: Field verification of vegetation. Review by certified erosion control professional. Compliance with EPA CGP.
notes: Area calculations are automatable. Erosion control design requires engineering judgment.

formula_complexity: Medium - Area percentage calculations, bird threat factor scoring based on glass area and context.
input_requirements: Site plan, existing vegetation survey, facade drawings, glass specifications, building context
tool_integration: GIS for habitat mapping, Bird collision assessment tools (e.g., Bird-Safe Building Designer), Native plant databases
validation: Habitat assessment by ecologist. Bird collision analysis per American Bird Conservancy guidelines.
notes: Area calculations straightforward. Bird collision analysis requires specialized tools and expertise.

formula_complexity: Low - Area percentage calculations, seating count based on area ratios.
input_requirements: Site plan, building footprint, outdoor space design, accessibility route plans
tool_integration: CAD/GIS for area calculations, ADA compliance checking tools
validation: Site plan review. ADA compliance verification by accessibility consultant.
notes: Simple area and ratio calculations. High automation potential for calculations, design compliance requires review.

formula_complexity: High - Hydrologic modeling with rainfall distributions, SCS Curve Number method, detention/retention sizing. Requires TR-55 or equivalent.
input_requirements: Site area, impervious coverage by type, local rainfall data (NOAA), soil infiltration rates (NRCS), slope data
tool_integration: NOAA rainfall databases, NRCS soil surveys, Stormwater modeling software (SWMM, HydroCAD), Local stormwater manuals
validation: Peer review of hydrologic calculations. Comparison with local stormwater manual requirements. Field verification of soil infiltration.
notes: Well-established hydrologic calculations can be fully automated. SWMM integration possible for complex sites.

calculation_types: Shade coverage calculations for heat mitigation
formula_complexity: Medium - Strategy selection based on hazard priority scores, performance metrics for resilience strategies.
input_requirements: IPp1 hazard assessment results, site design parameters, local climate data, resilience strategy database
tool_integration: IPp1 assessment data, SITES rating system tools, Climate adaptation databases
validation: Resilience strategy review by climate adaptation specialist. Cross-check with local building codes.
notes: Relies heavily on IPp1 outputs. Strategy matching can be automated, but effectiveness requires expert judgment.

formula_complexity: Low to Medium - Weighted area calculations based on material SRI values. Simple percentage calculations for coverage.
input_requirements: Site plan, roof areas, paving areas, material SRI values, Tree Equity Score (US only)
tool_integration: Material SRI databases (CRRC), American Forests Tree Equity Score API, CAD/GIS for area calculations
validation: Verify SRI values with CRRC-rated product database. Cross-check area calculations with design drawings.
notes: Straightforward weighted calculations. SRI databases readily available. Very high automation potential.

formula_complexity: Low - Lookup table verification against IES TM-15-11, luminance threshold checking.
input_requirements: Luminaire schedules with BUG ratings, lighting zone classification, signage specifications
tool_integration: IES TM-15-11 standards database, Luminaire manufacturer databases, Lighting zone maps
validation: Verify BUG ratings with manufacturer photometric files. Cross-check lighting zone with local ordinances.
notes: Primarily database lookup and threshold verification. Very high automation potential.

formula_complexity: Low - Basic meter sizing based on expected flow rates.
input_requirements: Building water systems, alternative water sources, facility management structure
tool_integration: Meter manufacturer sizing tools, USGBC Arc platform API
validation: Meter specification review by plumbing engineer. Arc platform setup verification.
notes: Primarily equipment specification and reporting setup. Limited calculations.

formula_complexity: Medium - Water use calculations per ASHRAE 189.1/EPA WaterSense. Irrigation = ET₀ × Kₗ × Kₛ × Area. Baseline vs proposed comparisons.
input_requirements: Fixture schedules with flow rates, occupancy counts, landscape areas by plant type, local ET₀ data, appliance specifications
tool_integration: EPA WaterSense calculators, Irrigation scheduling software, Fixture manufacturer databases, ENERGY STAR appliance database
validation: Verify fixture flow rates with manufacturer documentation. Cross-check irrigation with local water authority methods.
notes: Standard water use calculations well-documented. Can be fully automated with proper inputs.

formula_complexity: Low - Percentage coverage calculations, sensor spacing based on system characteristics.
input_requirements: Building water systems, fixture counts, irrigation zones, process water systems, meal counts, laundry projections
tool_integration: Plumbing design software, Leak detection system manufacturer tools, BMS integration platforms
validation: Submeter plan review by plumbing engineer. Leak detection system specification review.
notes: Coverage calculations straightforward. Sensor placement requires system knowledge.

formula_complexity: High - Comprehensive water modeling integrating all sources and uses. Optimization algorithms for alternative water integration. Water balance = Supply - Demand - Losses.
input_requirements: All indoor water uses, outdoor irrigation, process water, cooling tower makeup, alternative water sources (rainwater, graywater, reclaimed), local rainfall data
tool_integration: Water modeling software (e.g., Watergy, WaterSense calculators), Rainwater harvesting calculators, Graywater system design tools
validation: Water model validation against utility bills (for existing buildings). Peer review of alternative water calculations.
notes: Complex integrated modeling but well-established methodologies. High automation potential with comprehensive inputs.

credit_name: Operational Carbon Projection and Decarbonization Plan
formula_complexity: High - Time-series carbon modeling with changing grid factors. Annual Carbon = Σ(Energyᵢ × GridFactorᵢ). Requires NPV-style analysis over building life.
input_requirements: Energy model outputs by fuel type, grid emission factors (eGRID), grid decarbonization projections, fuel costs, electrification options
tool_integration: EnergyPlus/OpenStudio, EPA eGRID database, Grid decarbonization models (NREL), Building life-cycle cost tools
validation: Energy model calibration against similar buildings. Grid factor validation with EPA eGRID. Peer review of decarbonization pathway.
notes: Complex but well-defined calculations. Integration with energy models enables high automation.

formula_complexity: High - Full building energy simulation per ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G. Baseline vs proposed modeling with complex rulesets.
input_requirements: Building envelope specifications, HVAC systems, lighting design, service water heating, climate zone, building type
tool_integration: EnergyPlus, OpenStudio, eQUEST, Trane TRACE, Carrier HAP, ASHRAE 90.1 compliance tools
validation: Energy model quality assurance per ASHRAE Standard 90.1. Third-party model review. Calibration if utility data available.
notes: Complex energy modeling but standardized methodologies. Tools like EnergyPlus/OpenStudio automate most calculations.

formula_complexity: Low - Primarily process documentation and scheduling. Limited quantitative analysis.
input_requirements: Project schedule, design milestones, system types, owner requirements
tool_integration: Project management software, Cx management platforms
validation: Cx plan review by qualified CxP. ASHRAE 202 compliance verification.
notes: Process-based prerequisite with minimal calculation requirements.

formula_complexity: Low - Meter sizing and placement per code requirements. Data categorization.
input_requirements: Energy systems, metering points, building type, Arc platform requirements
tool_integration: ASHRAE 90.1 metering tables, USGBC Arc platform API, BMS integration tools
validation: Metering plan review by electrical engineer. Arc platform setup verification.
notes: Primarily equipment specification and reporting setup. Limited calculations.

formula_complexity: Low - Database lookup for refrigerant types, schedule compliance checking.
input_requirements: HVAC equipment schedules, refrigerant types, existing system inventory
tool_integration: EPA refrigerant databases, Montreal Protocol schedules, Equipment manufacturer databases
validation: Refrigerant type verification with equipment manufacturer. EPA regulation compliance check.
notes: Primarily database verification. GWP values and phase-out schedules are standardized.

formula_complexity: Medium - Weighted average calculations: COP_avg = Σ(COPᵢ × Loadᵢ) / Σ(Loadᵢ). System-by-system electrification pathway analysis.
input_requirements: HVAC equipment schedules with COPs, heating loads by system, DHW loads, climate zone, electrical capacity
tool_integration: Energy model outputs, Equipment manufacturer databases (AHRI), Electrical load analysis tools
validation: COP verification with AHRI certificates. Load calculations per ASHRAE standards. Electrical capacity verification.
notes: Straightforward weighted calculations. Equipment databases provide COP data. High automation potential.

formula_complexity: Medium - Envelope thermal analysis, ERV effectiveness calculations, thermal bridge modeling. Peak load comparison baseline vs proposed.
input_requirements: Building envelope specifications, air leakage targets, ventilation design, energy model, thermal bridge details
tool_integration: Energy modeling software, Thermal bridge calculation tools (THERM, PsiTherm), Blower door test protocols
validation: Air leakage testing per ASTM E779. Thermal bridge analysis validation. Energy model QA.
notes: Mix of calculations and testing. Thermal bridge analysis requires specialized tools.

formula_complexity: High - Full energy modeling per ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G. Percent improvement = (Baseline - Proposed) / Baseline × 100.
input_requirements: Complete energy model (baseline and proposed), building specifications, utility rates, climate zone
tool_integration: EnergyPlus, OpenStudio, eQUEST, ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G tools, Utility rate databases
validation: Energy model quality assurance per ASHRAE Standard 90.1. Third-party model review.
notes: Complex energy modeling but standardized. Energy modeling software automates most calculations.

calculation_types: Percent of annual energy use calculations
formula_complexity: Medium - Renewable production modeling (PVWatts for solar), percentage calculations, REC matching.
input_requirements: Building energy use, roof area and orientation, solar resource data, REC procurement plans, financial parameters
tool_integration: NREL PVWatts, SAM for renewable modeling, Green-e registry, Solar feasibility tools
validation: PV production estimates validated against actual systems. REC verification through Green-e registry.
notes: PVWatts provides standardized solar calculations. REC tracking systems enable verification.

formula_complexity: Medium - Statistical analysis for fault detection, performance baseline calculations.
input_requirements: BMS data streams, energy consumption data, system performance parameters, equipment specifications
tool_integration: MBCx platforms (SkySpark, KGS Clockworks, CopperTree), BMS integration, Analytics software
validation: MBCx system validation through manual fault verification. Performance baseline calibration.
notes: MBCx involves both automated analytics and manual verification. Analytics can be highly automated.

calculation_types: Smart grid integration load management algorithms
formula_complexity: Medium - Load flexibility analysis, storage dispatch optimization, demand response capability assessment.
input_requirements: Building loads by end-use, DR-capable equipment, storage specifications, utility DR programs, tariff structures
tool_integration: Demand response management systems, Energy storage sizing tools, Utility program databases
validation: DR capability testing. Storage system performance verification. Utility program compliance check.
notes: Calculations require understanding of building loads and utility programs. Some optimization possible.

formula_complexity: Low - Total GWP = Σ(Refrigerant Charge × GWP per kg). Simple threshold comparisons.
input_requirements: HVAC equipment schedules, refrigerant charges by system, refrigerant GWP values, system types
tool_integration: Refrigerant GWP databases (IPCC, EPA), Equipment manufacturer databases, Leak detection system tools
validation: Refrigerant charge verification with equipment specs. GWP values from IPCC/EPA. Leak detection code compliance.
notes: Straightforward calculations with standardized GWP values. Very high automation potential.

formula_complexity: Low - Waste generation rates by building type, area-based storage sizing.
input_requirements: Building type, occupancy, floor plans, local recycling services, waste generation rates
tool_integration: Waste generation rate databases, Recycling service directories, Storage sizing tools
validation: Waste generation estimates compared to similar buildings. Storage area code compliance.
notes: Primarily planning and documentation. Limited calculations required.

formula_complexity: Medium - Material quantity × GWP factor calculations. Total Embodied Carbon = Σ(Materialᵢ × Quantityᵢ × GWPᵢ).
input_requirements: Structural drawings, material specifications, quantity take-offs, EPDs or industry average GWP values
tool_integration: WBLCA tools (Tally, One Click LCA, EC3), BIM quantity extraction, EPD databases
validation: Quantity take-off validation. EPD verification through program operators. Cross-check with CLF Material Baselines.
notes: Well-established WBLCA methodologies. Tools like Tally and EC3 automate most calculations.

formula_complexity: Low - Area percentage calculations, material value summation.
input_requirements: Existing building survey, demolition plans, salvage material inventory, market values
tool_integration: CAD for area calculations, Salvage material databases, Cost estimation tools
validation: Existing building survey verification. Salvage material value documentation.
notes: Simple percentage calculations. Material valuation requires market research.

formula_complexity: High - Comprehensive WBLCA with baseline comparison. Reduction % = (Baseline - Proposed) / Baseline × 100. Construction emissions tracking.
input_requirements: Material quantities, EPDs, baseline project data, construction fuel/energy use, equipment hours
tool_integration: WBLCA tools (Tally, One Click LCA), EC3 database, EPD registries, Construction emission tracking tools
validation: WBLCA review by LCA practitioner. EPD verification. Baseline appropriateness review.
notes: Complex LCA calculations but well-established tools exist. High automation potential with proper data.

formula_complexity: Low - Percentage calculations for compliant products by category.
input_requirements: Product specifications, manufacturer certifications, product submittals, emission standards (CDPH, GREENGUARD)
tool_integration: CDPH Standard Method database, GREENGUARD registry, FloorScore database, HPD databases
validation: Certification verification with program operators. Product specification review.
notes: Primarily database verification and percentage calculations. High automation potential.

formula_complexity: Low - Counting and categorization of products with documentation. Points summation.
input_requirements: Product specifications, manufacturer documentation, EPDs, HPDs, certification claims
tool_integration: EPD registries (ECO Platform, UL), HPD Collaborative database, FSC registry, Cradle to Cradle registry
validation: EPD/HPD verification with program operators. Certification validation with issuing bodies.
notes: Primarily documentation tracking and verification. Limited calculations.

calculation_types: Waste quantity tracking by material stream
formula_complexity: Low - Diversion % = (Recycled + Reused) / Total Waste × 100. Material stream categorization.
input_requirements: Waste manifests, hauler reports, material weights, facility recycling rates
tool_integration: Waste tracking platforms, Hauler reporting systems, Facility certification databases
validation: Waste manifest verification. Hauler report cross-check. Facility recycling rate confirmation.
notes: Straightforward percentage calculations. Tracking systems can automate data collection.

formula_complexity: Low - Heat index calculations from temperature and humidity. Primarily process documentation.
input_requirements: Construction schedule, site conditions, weather data, material delivery schedule
tool_integration: Weather data APIs, Heat index calculators, Project management platforms
validation: IAQ plan review. Heat illness prevention compliance with OSHA guidelines.
notes: Process-based prerequisite. Limited calculation requirements.

calculation_types: Outdoor air intake requirements by space
formula_complexity: Medium - Ventilation calculations per ASHRAE 62.1: Vbz = Rp × Pz + Ra × Az. Multiple space system calculations.
input_requirements: Space types, occupancy, floor areas, outdoor air quality data, HVAC design
tool_integration: ASHRAE 62.1 calculation tools, EPA AQI data, HVAC design software
validation: Ventilation calculations per ASHRAE 62.1. Filtration specification verification. Design review.
notes: Standardized ventilation calculations. HVAC design software automates most of this.

formula_complexity: Low - Distance calculations for buffer zones. Signage placement.
input_requirements: Building entries, air intake locations, operable windows, site plan
tool_integration: CAD/GIS for distance calculations, Signage placement tools
validation: Site plan review. Policy document verification.
notes: Simple geometric calculations. High automation potential.

calculation_types: Enhanced IAQ design verification (PM2.5, formaldehyde, ozone limits)
formula_complexity: Medium - Enhanced ventilation: Vbz_enhanced = 1.15 × Vbz_baseline. IAQ design verification against enhanced limits.
input_requirements: Baseline ventilation rates, HVAC design, IAQ design targets, enhanced limits
tool_integration: ASHRAE 62.1 tools, IAQ modeling software, HVAC design software
validation: Ventilation calculations verification. IAQ design review against enhanced criteria.
notes: Straightforward enhancement calculations. HVAC software automates ventilation calculations.

formula_complexity: High - Daylight simulation requires radiance calculations. Thermal comfort: PMV/PPD calculations. Acoustic: NC/RC curves. Lighting: UGR/DGP glare metrics.
input_requirements: Building geometry, glazing specifications, interior layouts, site surroundings, HVAC parameters, lighting design, acoustic criteria
tool_integration: Daylight simulation (Radiance, DIVA, ClimateStudio), Thermal comfort tools (CBE Thermal Comfort Tool), Acoustic modeling (EASE, ODEON), Lighting analysis (DIALux, Relux)
validation: Daylight model validation. Thermal comfort verification. Acoustic testing. Lighting measurements.
notes: Complex simulations required but specialized tools exist. Integration of multiple analysis types.

formula_complexity: Low - Primarily qualitative assessment and checklist completion.
input_requirements: Floor plans, design specifications, accessibility goals
tool_integration: ADA compliance checking tools, Accessibility assessment checklists
validation: Accessibility consultant review. ADA compliance verification.
notes: Primarily qualitative assessment. Limited calculations.

formula_complexity: Medium - Percentage coverage calculations, thermal modeling for passive survivability.
input_requirements: HVAC design, building envelope, operable window specifications, priority hazards from IPp1
tool_integration: Energy modeling for passive survivability, Window schedule analysis
validation: Operable window coverage verification. Thermal safety modeling review.
notes: Mix of simple calculations and thermal modeling. Passive survivability requires energy modeling.

formula_complexity: Low - Area-based testing location calculations, sensor spacing, threshold comparisons.
input_requirements: Building area, space types, testing requirements, monitoring system options
tool_integration: LEED testing protocols, Sensor specification tools, Testing laboratory coordination
validation: Testing protocol review. Sensor specification verification. Laboratory certification check.
notes: Primarily planning and specification. Limited complex calculations.

formula_complexity: Low - Database lookups for regional priorities, threshold comparisons, points summation.
input_requirements: Project location, pursued credits, project type, innovation ideas
tool_integration: USGBC Regional Priority credit database, Project Priority Library, Pilot credit library
validation: Regional priority verification with USGBC. Exemplary performance review.
notes: Primarily database lookups and points tracking. Limited calculations.

formula_complexity: Low - Database lookup for credential status. Binary verification.
input_requirements: Team roster, credential information
tool_integration: GBCI credential directory API
validation: GBCI credential verification.
notes: Simple database verification. Very high automation potential.
